# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on pull requests and includes the PR title and description in build notifications. Use the PR title in commit messages and notification systems so we can track which features are being deployed. This helps with our release notes automation.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Build and Deploy

on:
  pull_request:
    branches:
      - main

env:
  GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
  GITHUB_EVENT_NAME: ${{ github.event.name }}
  GITHUB_REF: ${{ github.event.ref }}
  GITHUB_REPOSITORY: ${{ github.repository }}

jobs:
  build-and-deploy:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v2

      - name: Setup Node
        uses: actions/setup-node@v1
        with:
          node-version: '14'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm install

      - name: Build
        run: |
          echo "::set-output name=build::$(date +'%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S') $(npm run build)"
          echo "Commit Message: ${GITHUB_EVENT_NAME} (${GITHUB_REF}): ${GITHUB_API_REFS[0].title}"
          echo "PR Title: ${GITHUB_API_REFS[0].title}"

      - name: Deploy
        uses: appleboy/ssh-action@v0.3.1
        with:
          host: ${{ secrets.APP_HOST }}
          username: ${{ secrets.APP_USERNAME }}
          password: ${{ secrets.APP_PASSWORD }}
          script: 'npm run deploy'
